metadata.query: BYD enters new market 2024 first delivery

sources.title: Top stories of BYD in 2024 | Gasgoo
sources.content:

# Top stories of BYD in 2024

Monika From Gasgoo|

[f SHARE](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u= "Share to Facebook")[TWEET](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Top%20stories%20of%20BYD%20in%202024&url=&via=Gasgoo_com "Share to Twitter")[in SHARE](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url= "Share to Linkedin")

![QR Code](http://auto.gasgoo.com/QrCode/QrCode.aspx?text=)

Scan for mobile

In 2024, BYD, the Chinese electric vehicle and battery manufacturing giant, continued to make waves on a global scale, solidifying its position as a leader in the new energy vehicle (NEV) industry. The year was marked by a series of remarkable achievements across various fronts, from production and sales milestones to significant advancements in technology and far-reaching global expansion efforts.

Photo credit: BYD

As we take a closer look at the company's journey throughout the year, we'll explore how these achievements have shaped BYD's trajectory and influenced the broader automotive landscape.

[**BYD launches 3-billion-yuan education charity fund to support scholarships, promote NEV tech**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035553.html)

On December 30, BYD officially launched a 3-billion-yuan education charity fund, marking the occasion with initial donations to 35 universities and 28 science and technology museums across China.

The fund would focus on supporting scholarships for higher education and promoting public awareness of new energy vehicle (NEV) technologies. BYD plans to partner with over 100 universities nationwide to establish scholarships. Additionally, the company will donate exhibits showcasing NEV technologies to science museums, technology centers, and select schools to inspire and educate young people about advancements in the field.

[**BYD forays into Ethiopian market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/china_news/70035505.html)

On December 21, 2024, BYD made its official debut in the Ethiopian market via a brand launch event in Addis Ababa, in collaboration with local distributor MOENCO, a subsidiary of the Inchcape PLC, a London-based company specializing in global distribution & retail services for premium and luxury automotive sectors.

[**BYD's YANGWANG rolls out HD map-free urban NOA feature nationwide for YANGWANG U8**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/icv/70035501.html)

In late December, YANGWANG, BYD's high-end brand, rolled out significant OTA updates for its U8 Luxury Edition (V2.1.0) and U8 Off-road Player Edition (V2.1.1). The updates bring 19 new features and 16 optimizations to the Luxury Edition, and 18 new features with 17 enhancements to the Off-road Player Edition. Notably, the U8 Luxury Edition now supports nationwide urban navigation pilot function.

[**BYD Qin family's 2 millionth vehicle rolls off production line**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/china_news/70035477.html)

On December 20, Lu Tian, General Manager of BYD's Dynasty Network Sales Division, announced on his social media that the 2 millionth vehicle under BYD's Qin family rolled off the production line.

[**BYD opens first flagship store in Kuwait**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035478.html)

On December 15, 2024, BYD, in partnership with local dealer Alghanim Industries, celebrated the grand opening of its first flagship store in Kuwait, according to a press release from BYD.

[**BYD opens two dealerships in Estonia**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035435.html)

On December 11, BYD, in collaboration with leading global international dealership group Inchcape Motors, officially opened two new stores in Estonia, located in the capital city of Tallinn and the second-largest city, Tartu, respectively.

Catering to the preferences and needs of local consumers, BYD introduced several models, including the BYD SEAL, BYD SEAL U (named Song PLUS EV in China), BYD SEAL U DM-i (named Song PLUS DM-i in China), and BYD DOLPHIN, with pre-sales beginning the same day.

[**BYD introduces five NEV models, opens three showrooms in Oman**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/china_news/70035409.html)

In early December, BYD put five new energy vehicle (NEV) models, including the BYD HAN, BYD ATTO 3 (named BYD Yuan Plus in China), BYD SEAL, BYD SONG PLUS DM-i, and BYD QIN PLUS DM-i, onto the Omani market, according to a post on its WeChat account.

[**BYD's FANGCHENGBAO unveils fire new product series 'TAI'**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035367.html)

On December 10, BYD's FANGCHENGBAO brand officially unveiled its new household-oriented rugged product series, TAI (named in Chinese Pinyin, written in "钛" in Chinese character, translating to "Titanium"). This marks the company's second major product line following the BAO series and establishes a new direction for "household rugged" electric vehicles.

**BYD India's 5,000th vehicle rolls off production line**

On November 29, BYD saw the 5,000th vehicle made at its India manufacturing plant roll off the production line, marking its key role in the rapidly growing Indian electric vehicle.

[**BYD, Indonesia's state-owned electricity company PLN co-launch home charging service concept**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035318.html)

At the GJAW 2024, BYD partnered with Indonesia's State Electricity Company ("PLN") to introduce a new home charging service concept. This initiative, accessible through the PLN Mobile app, aims to provide EV owners with a more efficient and convenient charging experience. As part of PLN's strategy to enhance public awareness of EV infrastructure and accelerate EV adoption in Indonesia, this collaboration marks a significant milestone.

[**BYD, TAILG form strategic cooperation in two-/three-wheel EV battery field**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035302.html)

On December 2, 2024, TAILG Technology Group ("TAILG") and Shenzhen BYD Lithium Battery Co., Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of BYD Company Limited, officially announced a strategic partnership in the field of batteries for two- and three-wheel electric vehicles (EVs) at a signing ceremony in Wuxi city, according to a post on FinDreams Battery's WeChat account.

[**BYD's second ro-ro ship sets sail for UK, Netherlands**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035300.html)

On November 29, BYD's second roll-on/roll-off (ro-ro) vessel, named "BYD CHANGZHOU" after the company's Changzhou factory, departed from Yantai, Shandong province. After loading nearly 5,000 BYD new energy vehicles (NEVs) at Lianyungang and Taicang ports in Jiangsu province, the ship is en route to the port of Bristol, UK, and the port of Rotterdam, the Netherlands. This addition significantly strengthens BYD's competitive edge in international shipping and accelerates its global market expansion.

[**BYD releases 2025 T5 light-duty truck**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035197.html)

On November 21, BYD Commercial Vehicle held the first showcase event for the 2025 T5 light-duty truck series in Dongguan city, Guangdong province, marking the debut of the new model.

[**BYD signs agreement for building Phase IV facility of industrial park in Shenshan Special Cooperation Zone**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035166.html)

On November 19, BYD signed an agreement with the Shenshan Special Cooperation Zone during the Shenzhen Intelligent Connected Vehicles and Advanced Materials Industry Investment Promotion Conference, aiming to build the Phase IV facility of the Shenshan BYD Auto Industrial Park, according to a post on an official WeChat account of Shenzhen's government. This development signifies a further boost to BYD's investment in the city.

[**BYD hits production milestone of 10 million new energy vehicles**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/video/70035142.html)

On November 18, BYD marked its 30th anniversary by rolling off its 10 millionth new energy vehicle (NEV) at the BYD Xiaomo Industrial Park in Shenzhen's Shenshan Special Cooperation Zone. With this achievement, BYD has become the first automaker globally to reach the 10-million NEV production mark.

[**BYD signs electric bus project agreement with Azerbaijani government at COP29**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035124.html)

The 29th United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP29) is currently underway in Baku, Azerbaijan, from November 11 to 22. On November 13, during the event at the main venue's Green Zone News Center, BYD signed an agreement with the Azerbaijani government to implement an electric bus project.

[**BYD's YANGWANG brand kicks off pre-sales of YANGWANG U7 model at Auto Guangzhou 2024**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035132.html)

On November 15, BYD's YANGWANG debuted versions of its flagship YANGWANG U7 sedan, offering both PHEV and EV variants, at the Auto Guangzhou 2024.

Pre-sales for the U7 have officially begun, although the automaker did not disclose specific pricing. Interested customers can secure a pre-order with a 20,000-yuan deposit, unlocking exclusive pre-sale benefits. The display models are expected to arrive at dealerships starting in December this year.

[**BYD launches Song PRO PHEV model at Experience E in Chile**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035112.html)

From November 7 to November 10, the third Experiencia E, an international exhibition for sustainable mobility, took place in Chile. Chinese automaker BYD took the opportunity to debut its Song PRO model at the event.

Four key models were on display at the BYD booth: the BYD Song PLUS DM-i, the newly launched BYD Song PRO, the BYD Yuan UP, and the BYD SHARK. Attendees also had the chance to test drive these vehicles on a dedicated racetrack at the event.

[**BYD launches SEALION 7 all-electric SUV model in Europe**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035100.html)

On November 12, BYD launched its SEALION 7 model (named "Sealion 07 EV" in China) in Frankfurt, Germany, officially introducing the SUV to the European market.

[**BYD's FANGCHENGBAO puts BAO 8 model onto market, starting at 379,800 yuan**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035098.html)

On November 12, BYD's FANGCHENGBAO brand put its second mass-produced model, the BAO 8, onto the market with four different variants priced between 379,800 yuan and 407,800 yuan.

[**BYD releases YUAN PRO all-electric SUV onto Mexican market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035076.html)

On November 5, BYD officially launched its all-electric SUV, the YUAN PRO (called “Yuan UP” in China), at a grand event in Mexico City, marking a significant move in its global business expansion.

[**BYD's premium brand DENZA announces foray into Thai market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70035030.html)

On November 1, BYD's premium brand, DENZA, announced its official foray into the Thai market, marking Thailand as its fourth strategic market in the Asia-Pacific region, according to a post on DENZA's WeChat account. This expansion represents a significant step for DENZA in Southeast Asia's largest automotive market.

[**BYD SHARK 6 right-hand drive version makes global debut in Australia**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/china_news/70035026.html)

On October 29, BYD launched the right-hand-drive version of its SHARK 6 model in Broken Hill, New South Wales, Australia. Priced from AUD 57,900 (approximately 271,000 yuan), this model is specially tailored for off-road enthusiasts, featuring BYD’s advanced DMO hybrid technology. With a full tank and a fully charged battery, the SHARK 6 boasts a combined range of over 800 kilometers, appealing to drivers seeking both power and endurance.

[**BYD launches BYD SHARK 6 plug-in hybrid electric pickup in Cambodia**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034990.html)

On October 26, BYD and Harmony Auto jointly hosted a grand launch event for the new electric pickup, the BYD SHARK 6, in Cambodia. The event not only unveiled the SHARK 6 model but also introduced BYD's cutting-edge DM technology dedicated to plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (PHEV), offering an immersive experience for attendees.

[**BYD launches BYD SHARK hybrid pickup in Brazil**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034971.html)

On October 19, local time, BYD officially launched its first hybrid pickup truck, the BYD SHARK, in Brazil, not only marking the company's entry into the Brazilian pickup market, but also underscoring its comprehensive influence from urban environments to off-road adventures.

[**OPPO, BYD forge strategic partnership to integrate smartphones, cars**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034935.html)

On October 23, Chinese smartphone maker OPPO and leading new energy vehicle manufacturer BYD announced a strategic partnership to jointly advance the integration of smartphones and vehicles.

Their first collaborative product, the "Phone-Car Connectivity" system, will roll out via an OTA update on the DENZA Z9GT vehicle model and OPPO Find X8 smartphone series, enhancing the smart experience for users across both devices.

[**BYD Seal 06 GT model hits market, starting at 136,800 yuan**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034914.html)

On October 18, BYD officially put the Seal 06 GT, its first GT model designed specifically for young drivers, onto the market, with prices ranging from 136,800 yuan to 186,800 yuan.

[**BYD, Black Myth: Wukong enter into strategic partnership**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/video/70034913.html)

On October 20, BYD announced a global strategic partnership with the popular Chinese video game Black Myth: Wukong, becoming its exclusive automotive brand partner.

[**BYD SEALION 7 model hits European market at Paris Motor Show 2024**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034616.html)

On October 14, the Paris Motor Show 2024 opened at the Paris Expo Porte de Versailles, with BYD making a prominent appearance. The company displayed several car models, including the BYD SEALION 7 (named Sealion 07 EV in China), which officially hit the European market during the event.

[**BYD opens 9 dealership stores in Indonesia at one go**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034602.html)

On October 8, 2024, BYD held an opening ceremony for nine new stores in Bekasi, Indonesia, marking a significant step in the company's expansion within the Indonesian electric vehicle (EV) market, according to a post on BYD's WeChat account. This move not only strengthens BYD's market presence in Indonesia but also enhances customer access to after-sales services across different regions.

[**BYD's first electric buses for South Africa roll off line at Qingdao factory**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034591.html)

On October 8, BYD marked a significant milestone as the first 20 electric buses for a South African order rolled off the production line at the company's Qingdao factory, according to a post on BYD Commercial Vehicle's WeChat account.

[**BYD's DENZA enters Singaporean market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034579.html)

On October 10, BYD's DENZA brand officially entered the Singaporean market, marking its first step into right-hand drive car countries, Zhang Changjiang, general manager of DENZA's sales division, said on October 11 via his Weibo account.

[**BYD announces foray into Tajikistan's passenger vehicle market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034556.html)

On October 4, BYD held a brand launch event at the Dushanbe Expo Center, marking its official entry into Tajikistan's passenger vehicle market.

[**BYD debuts SHARK new energy pickup model in Panama**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034509.html)

In late September, BYD introduced its new energy pickup, the BYD SHARK, in Panama, marking the company's first PHEV (plug-in hybrid electric vehicle) model launched in the country, according to a post on BYD's WeChat account.

[**BYD Yuan UP BEV model hits Costa Rican market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034508.html)

In late September, BYD held the launch event for the Yuan UP (locally known as the NUEVO BYD S1 PRO) at the iconic Avenida Escazu shopping center in Costa Rica, according to a press release posted on BYD's WeChat account.

[**BYD delivers 100 full-electric buses to Uruguay's CUTCSA**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034483.html)

On September 19, BYD delivered 100 pure electric buses to CUTCSA, Uruguay's largest electric public transport operator, at its Qingdao factory. This handover ceremony marks another significant breakthrough for BYD in the international commercial vehicle market and provides a fresh boost to Uruguay's push towards green transportation.

[**BYD's 2nd-gen Song Pro DM-i, Sealion 05 DM-i hit market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034472.html)

On September 23, BYD announced the simultaneous market launch of two new compact SUVs: the Sealion 05 DM-i and the second-generation Song Pro DM-i. These sister models are aimed at the growing demand for electrified SUVs in the Chinese market, both featuring advanced plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) technologies.

[**BYD opens new showroom in Dubai**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034433.html)

On September 12, BYD, in partnership with Al-Futtaim, celebrated the grand opening of its flagship store on Dubai's prestigious Sheikh Zayed Road. This new location marks another significant milestone for BYD in the region, following the success of its Festival City showroom.

[**BYD, CEVA Logistics team up on logistics, ground transportation in Europe**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034434.html)

On September 17, during the IAA Transportation 2024 in Hanover, Germany, BYD and CEVA Logistics announced a strategic partnership focused on logistics and ground transportation in Europe, according to a press release from BYD.

[**BYD launches M6 MPV model in Thailand**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034398.html)

On September 9, BYD officially launched its latest multi-purpose vehicle (MPV) model, the BYD M6, in Bangkok, Thailand, according to a press release from BYD.

[**2025 BYD Han DM-i, EV models go on sale with upgraded smart driving, chassis systems**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034388.html)

On September 9, BYD officially put the 2025 models of the Han EV and the Han DM-i onto the market. The new lineup includes four variants of the 2025 Han EV, priced between 179,800 yuan and 235,800 yuan, and five variants of the Han DM-i, ranging from 165,800 yuan to 225,800 yuan.

[**BYD introduces 3 BEV models in Zambia**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034383.html)

On September 5, BYD, in partnership with local distributor Pilatus Group, held a grand launch event in Lusaka, Zambia's capital, unveiling three new all-electric car models for the local market: the Yuan PLUS (known internationally as the BYD ATTO 3), the SEAL, and the DOLPHIN.

[**BYD introduces Yuan UP model in Ecuadorian market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034352.html)

In early September, BYD made a major presence at the Automundo Auto Show in Quito, Ecuador, unveiling the Yuan UP (locally named BYD Yuan Pro in Ecuador), marking the automaker's seventh model introduced to the Ecuadorian market.

[**BYD opens first showroom in Suriname**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034331.html)

BYD opened its first showroom in Paramaribo, the capital of Suriname, marking its foray into the Surinamese market, the Chinese automaker announced on Sept. 2 via its WeChat account.

[**BYD unveils new flagship MPV 'Xia' at Chengdu Motor Show 2024**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034312.html)

On August 30, the Chengdu Motor Show officially kicked off, showcasing a range of new vehicles. Among the highlights is BYD's new flagship MPV model, the Xia, which is set to hit the market later this year with a starting price expected around 300,000 yuan.

[**BYD FANGCHENGBAO's vehicles to adopt Huawei's smart driving tech**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/icv/70034280.html)

BYD's FANGCHENGBAO brand and the ICT giant Huawei jointly announced on Aug. 27 that they had recently signed a strategic agreement in Shenzhen to collaborate on intelligent driving technology.

[**BYD puts SONG PRO DM-i model onto Mexican market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034265.html)

On August 21, BYD saw its SONG PRO DM-i model officially hit the Mexican market. This follows the global debut of the BYD SHARK pickup truck in Mexico in May, further expanding BYD's lineup of NEVs in the local market.

[**BYD announces foray into Pakistani passenger car market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034252.html)

On August 17, 2024, BYD made a grand entrance into the Pakistani passenger car market with a brand launch event at the Expo Centre Lahore. The event marked a significant milestone for BYD as it officially ventured into Pakistan's automotive sector.

[**BYD opens new flagship store in Chile**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034242.html)

BYD's Chilean distributor, ASTARA Group, recently celebrated the grand opening of its flagship store in Lo Barnechea, Santiago, according to a press release issued by BYD in late August. This marks BYD's ninth store in Chile, where the company had already introduced nine models of all-electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles.

[**BYD opens first store in Sri Lanka with introduction of SEALION 6 PHEV model**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034208.html)

In mid-August, BYD has made a significant stride in Sri Lanka with the grand opening of its first store and after-sales service center in Colombo. Marking the occasion, BYD also introduced there the BYD SEALION 6 PHEV (plug-in hybrid electric vehicle) model.

[**BYD puts BYD SEALION 6 DM-i model onto Thai market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034157.html)

On August 8, 2024, BYD held a grand launch event at its passenger car production base in Rayong, Thailand, to introduce the BYD SEALION 6 DM-i, which is known domestically in China as the Song PLUS DM-i. This event marked the official entry of this plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) model into the Thai market.

[**BYD Yuan UP full-electric SUV hits Colombian market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034145.html)

In early August, BYD put its pure electric SUV, the Yuan UP, onto the Colombian market, according to a post on BYD's WeChat official account.

[**BYD's first dealership in Poland opens for business**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034134.html)

On August 6, BYD officially opened its first dealership in Poland. The opening ceremony took place in Warsaw, marking a significant milestone for BYD's expansion into the Polish market.

[**BYD Yuan UP BEV model hits Chilean market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034124.html)

In August 7, the BYD Yuan UP (locally named BYD YUAN PRO) officially hit the Chilean market in Santiago, the capital of Chile, at Farellones snow mountain. This marks the ninth model introduced by BYD into this country, further expanding its local vehicle lineup.

[**BYD, Uber join hands to boost electric vehicle adoption**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034083.html)

On July 31, BYD announced a multi-year strategic partnership with global mobility service and delivery technology giant Uber, aiming to deploy 100,000 new BYD electric vehicles (EVs) in key markets worldwide. This collaboration is set to significantly expand BYD's EV presence on the Uber platform.

[**BYD secures order of 120 electric buses from South African bus operator**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70034035.html)

On July 23, local time, BYD South Africa (hereinafter referred to as "BYD") announced a partnership with prominent South African bus operator Golden Arrow, securing an order for 120 electric buses. This agreement marks the creation of South Africa's first electric bus fleet.

[**FORVIA, BYD inaugurate new seat assembly plant in Thailand**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033999.html)

On July 18, global automotive technology supplier FORVIA, in collaboration with BYD, inaugurated a new seat assembly plant in Rayong, Thailand.

[**BYD introduces three BEV models in Vietnamese market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033998.html)

On July 18, BYD announced its foray into the Vietnamese market with the introduction of three battery electric vehicle (BEV) models: the BYD SEAL, BYD DOLPHIN, and BYD ATTO 3 (known as Yuan PLUS in China). Prices for these models start at 659 million VND (approximately 202,559 yuan).

[**BYD launches BYD M6 all-electric MPV model in Indonesia**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033997.html)

In late July, BYD launched the all-electric MPV, the BYD M6, at the 31st GAIKINDO Indonesia International Auto Show (GIIAS), marking a significant milestone as it is not only BYD's first MPV model released for the Indonesian market but also the first all-electric MPV to be introduced in Indonesia, according to a press release BYD issued in late July via its WeChat account.

[**BYD launches Yuan PLUS BEV model in Senegal**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033994.html)

BYD held a grand brand launch event in Dakar, the capital of Senegal, marking the official introduction of its battery electric vehicle, the Yuan PLUS (known as the BYD ATTO 3 outside of China), to the Senegalese market, according to a press release BYD issued on July 19 via its WeChat account.

[**BYD introduces Song PLUS DM-i model in Ecuador**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033948.html)

In mid-July, the largest and most influential auto show in Ecuador, the Autoshow Guayaquil 2024, took place as scheduled. At this event, BYD held the launch of its Song PLUS DM-i, marking the debut of its plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) model in the Ecuadorian market.

[**BYD's YANGWANG debuts at Goodwood Festival of Speed**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/video/70033943.html)

On July 11, 2024, the Goodwood Festival of Speed officially kicked off. This year's festival embraces the theme: Horseless to Hybrid - Revolution in Power.

At the event, BYD's luxury brand, YANGWANG, showcasing two stunning models: the YANGWANG U8 and U9. For the first time in the motorsports festival's 31-year history, a high-end Chinese brand in the million-RMB range is part of the lineup.

[**BYD, Ayvens sign MoU to boost green mobility in Europe**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033887.html)

On July 2nd, BYD and Ayvens, a global sustainable mobility service company, officially signed a strategic cooperation memorandum of understanding (MoU) at BYD's headquarters in Shenzhen. The partnership aims to jointly promote the green transformation of transportation in Europe.

[**BYD inaugurates Thai factory with 8 millionth NEV rolling off line**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033844.html)

On July 4, BYD celebrated the completion of its factory in Rayong, Thailand, and the rollout of its 8 millionth NEV.

[**BYD obtains electric bus orders from Azerbaijan's government**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033838.html)

In early July, BYD successfully won the bid for Azerbaijan's government procurement project for electric buses, securing an order for 160 units of the 12-meter electric bus model K9UD, according to a post on BYD's WeChat account. The buses were scheduled to be shipped to Azerbaijan in several batches starting this month.

[**BYD introduces five NEV models in Tunisian market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033807.html)

On June 27, local time, BYD held a brand revitalization press conference in Tunisia, officially introducing three battery electric vehicle (BEV) models to the Tunisian market: the Tang, Dolphin, and Yuan PLUS (locally known as BYD ATTO 3), as well as two plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) models: the Destroyer 05 (locally known as BYD KING) and Song PLUS DM-i.

[**BYD's Uzbekistan factory rolls off first batch Song PLUS DM-i Champion Edition vehicles**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/china_news/70033773.html)

On June 27, the first batch of BYD's Song PLUS DM-i Champion Edition vehicles rolled off the production line at the Chinese electric vehicle maker's Uzbekistan factory.

[**BYD puts SEAL EV onto Japanese market**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/china_news/70033757.html)

In late June, BYD launched its electric vehicle model, the SEAL, in the Japanese market. The SEAL comes in two variants, both equipped with an 82.56 kWh battery. The rear-wheel-drive variant is priced at 5.28 million yen (approximately 240,000 yuan) with a range of about 640 km, while the all-wheel-drive version costs 6.05 million yen (approximately 275,500 yuan) with a range of about 575 km.

[**BYD introduces SEAGULL BEV model in Ecuador**](https://autonews.gasgoo.com/new_energy/70033566.html)
